mapper.select: select id, code, name, provider_type, base_url, status, cast(rate_limit_json as char) as rate_limit_json, cast(quota_json as char) as quota_json from providers order by id desc
select id, code, name, provider_type, base_url, status, cast(rate_limit_json as char) as rate_limit_json, cast(quota_json as char) as quota_json from providers where id = #{id}
mapper.insert: insert into providers(code, name, provider_type, base_url, status, rate_limit_json, quota_json) values(#{code}, #{name}, #{providerType}, #{baseUrl}, #{status}, #{rateLimitJson}, #{quotaJson})
mapper.update: update providers set name = #{name}, provider_type = #{providerType}, base_url = #{baseUrl}, status = #{status}, rate_limit_json = #{rateLimitJson}, quota_json = #{quotaJson} where id = #{id}
